title: CobbleDian Fakemon pack 【Cobblemon】
description: hi is a Fakemon pack that implements the Fakemon art created by me and my friends, allowing you to enjoy more Pokemon!
body:
# CobbleDian_1.3
# Added new Fakemon

- Slaying Sword
- Slaying Sword Anceword
- Iron Soom
- Iron Spnd
- Febaas Twilord  
- Milotic Twilord  
# Added new Spawn
- Iron Blawing [Arid]
- Slaying Sword [Jungle]
- Iron Soom [Jungle]
- Iron Spnd [Jungle]
